Common Cold.description: A mild viral infection affecting the nose and throat.
Common Cold.advice: Drink plenty of fluids, rest well, and monitor symptoms.

Flu.description: A viral infection that affects the respiratory system.
Flu.advice: Get adequate rest, stay hydrated, and seek medical advice if symptoms worsen.

Migraine.description: A neurological condition causing severe headaches and sensitivity.
Migraine.advice: Rest in a quiet environment and consult a healthcare professional if frequent.

Gastritis.advice: Avoid spicy foods and seek medical advice if symptoms persist.

Bronchitis.description: Inflammation of the bronchial tubes in the lungs.

Viral Infection.description: An infection caused by a virus.
Viral Infection.advice: Rest, fluids, and symptom monitoring are generally recommended.

Food Poisoning.description: Illness caused by consuming contaminated food or beverages.
Food Poisoning.advice: Stay hydrated and seek medical care if symptoms become severe.

Stress Related Fatigue.description: Physical and mental exhaustion associated with stress.
Stress Related Fatigue.advice: Maintain proper sleep, exercise regularly, and manage stress.

Allergic Reaction.description: An immune system response to allergens.
Allergic Reaction.advice: Avoid known allergens and seek medical help for severe reactions.

Possible Emergency Condition.description: May indicate a serious medical emergency.
